diary_entries.entry: Population: 27. Small meteorite impacts near colony. I spent the year on terraforming. Closest to Cosmo-29.
Year 52 on Mars. Small meteorite impacts near colony. Morale is hopeful. We have 748 food units left.
The meteorite changed everything. I feel worried about our future here.

meta_awareness: Ares-18 (year 52): 'Today I realized: the output of Year 52 is the input to Year 53. We are being data-sloshed.'
